description: Software rendering configuration -- SwiftShader/ANGLE flags for headless Chromium, --disable-gpu and related Puppeteer launch args for software WebGL, GPU detection and optional GPU acceleration flags when available. Ensures correctness with software rendering per C-11 (engine must render correctly without GPU passthrough).
notes: Tier 4 interface. Covers C-11. Spec delivers rendering-config.ts module with resolveRenderingConfig(), probeWebGLRenderer(), validateWebGLCapabilities(). Supplementary args only — no duplication with OBJ-009. Three GPU modes: software/hardware/auto. Auto mode probes and logs without re-launch.
